kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:51734/v1/monitoring/otlp/v1/logs path_url=/v1/monitoring/otlp/v1/logs headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-org-id': '019d9660-8b03-7370-b4ac-c54b2b1d9986', 'x-user-id': '019d9b04-e269-7d73-a1c0-efccc4343197', 'Content-Length': '330'} body=b'{"resourceLogs": [{"resource": {"attributes": [{"key": "service.name", "value": {"stringValue": "e2e-logs-1776422281"}}]}, "scopeLogs": [{"scope": {"name": "e2e"}, "logRecords": [{"timeUnixNano": "1776422281994818048", "severityNumber": 9, "severityText": "SEV9", "body": {"stringValue": "e2e-logs-1776422281 info-row-one"}}]}]}]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
POST a single log record via OTLP endpoint. severity: 9=INFO, 13=WARN, 17=ERROR

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/sri/Documents/tennetctl/artifacts/13_monitoring_e2e/browser/traces/temp/ace88894-1018-42ef-ba23-77afd53d702c"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: about:blank

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="signin-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-logs-1776422281@tennetctl.test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pass-mon-logs-E2E!1' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 15000.0

kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Navigate to /monitoring/logs (Explorer tab), wait for rows to appear. At least one log row must be visible; confirms OTLP pipeline + UI query.

test.name: Severity Filter Info Shows Info Rows

test.doc: Click the INFO severity button — the explorer sends severity_min=9. Rows matching our service must include the info entries.

test.name: Severity Filter Error Narrows To Error Rows

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Unexpectedly huge result with error filter

test.doc: Click ERROR severity — should reduce to only error-level rows.

test.name: Live Tail Tab Is Reachable And Shows Component

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=LIVETAIL-1776422301 at state visible

test.doc: With live tail open, push a fresh log via OTLP and verify it appears.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Monitoring Logs — Explorer tab filtering + Live Tail streaming. Seeds logs via OTLP API, signs in via UI, asserts rows visible, severity filter works, and live tail streams new events.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/sri/Documents/tennetctl/artifacts/13_monitoring_e2e/browser/traces/temp/9b757a1b-10c7-4187-9042-5c1dd3dee273"}

kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-metrics-1776422302@tennetctl.test' in the given field.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Dashboard "${dash_name}" not found via API after creation
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Click "Add to dashboard" → modal appears → enter new dashboard name → confirm → modal closes → verify via API that the panel exists.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Monitoring Metrics — pick a metric, chart renders, bucket toggle re-renders, "Add to dashboard" modal creates a panel on a new dashboard.
